external_inputs: ALFWorld data requires a separate alfworld-download operation
MemoryAgentBench data may be loaded from an external Hugging Face dataset
six benchmark slices use separate environments, launch scripts, metrics, and task-specific adapters

evidence: The GitHub repository API returned license=null at the pinned commit.
The pinned 3910-file tree has no repository-root LICENSE or COPYING file; licenses only occur inside vendored memory-system subtrees.
The official README directs users to six task-level setups and says each evaluation setting has its own runtime requirements.
The official README explicitly requires alfworld-download for the embodied slice.
reconsider_when: The authors publish a repository-level license covering benchmark code and bundled data.
A selected benchmark slice has an immutable, self-contained input bundle and an authoritative native scoring entrypoint.
